productDisplayName: Puma Men's Drifter Black Green Flip Flops
description: Walk through your casual hours in absolute comfort in this pair of slippers from puma. With an ergonomically curved and padded footbed, and a grippy outsole, stay safe and comfortable on all kinds of surfaces.UpperWide synthetic leather straps with a toe separator and inner lining in twill tapeErgonomically padded footbed for all day comfortpuma branding on the forefoot and heelOutsoleTPR outsole with diagonal grooves for absolute grip and tractionshoe careWipe surface with a clean, damp clothDo not store in direct sunlight
